name: 沈母

appearance.face: 贵妇圆脸，保养得宜，表情势利
appearance.distinguishing_features: 势利却无奈的贵妇神态

visual_reference: Middle-aged Chinese noble matron mid-50s, round well-maintained face with calculating eyes, plump figure, elaborate jeweled updo, wearing luxurious blue-gold hanfu, haughty yet helpless expression, ancient Chinese setting, highly detailed masterpiece
personality: 势利偏心、看重门第、最终理亏退让
arc: 起点：安排义妹平妻 → 转变：生产后理亏上门 → 终点：放弃要孙女
scene_presence: 安排陆姝仪婚事、上门要孙女、被拒
